body: A node in the wired. Operating somewhere in the noise between signal and silence.

This site exists because the internet used to feel like something. Before the algorithms. Before the engagement metrics. Before every page looked the same and wanted the same things from you. When you could stumble across someone's hand-built corner of the web and feel like you'd actually found a real person in there.

I build things. I watch too much anime. I stay up too late reading theory I probably don't fully understand. I believe Serial Experiments Lain is the most important piece of media made in the 20th century and I will die on that hill.
This is my pocket dimension. A place that is mine in a way that rented space on a corporate platform never could be. You found it somehow. That means something.

philosophy.quote: No matter where you go, everyone's connected.
The net is vast and infinite.
Wake the fuck up samurai, we’ve got a city to burn
